dhp235-255:1.0.235: Paṇḍupalāsova dānisi,Yamapurisāpi ca te upaṭṭhitā;Uyyogamukhe ca tiṭṭhasi,Pātheyyampi ca te na vijjati.
dhp235-255:1.0.236: So karohi dīpamattano,Khippaṁ vāyama paṇḍito bhava;Niddhantamalo anaṅgaṇo,Dibbaṁ ariyabhūmiṁ upehisi.
dhp235-255:1.0.237: Upanītavayo ca dānisi,Sampayātosi yamassa santikaṁ;Vāso te natthi antarā,Pātheyyampi ca te na vijjati.
dhp235-255:1.0.238: So karohi dīpamattano,Khippaṁ vāyama paṇḍito bhava;Niddhantamalo anaṅgaṇo,Na punaṁ jātijaraṁ upehisi.
dhp235-255:1.0.239: Anupubbena medhāvī,thokaṁ thokaṁ khaṇe khaṇe;Kammāro rajatasseva,niddhame malamattano.
dhp235-255:1.0.240: Ayasāva malaṁ samuṭṭhitaṁ,Tatuṭṭhāya tameva khādati;Evaṁ atidhonacārinaṁ,Sāni kammāni nayanti duggatiṁ.
dhp235-255:1.0.241: Asajjhāyamalā mantā,anuṭṭhānamalā gharā;Malaṁ vaṇṇassa kosajjaṁ,pamādo rakkhato malaṁ.
dhp235-255:1.0.242: Malitthiyā duccaritaṁ,maccheraṁ dadato malaṁ;Malā ve pāpakā dhammā,asmiṁ loke paramhi ca.
dhp235-255:1.0.243: Tato malā malataraṁ,avijjā paramaṁ malaṁ;Etaṁ malaṁ pahantvāna,nimmalā hotha bhikkhavo.
dhp235-255:1.0.248: Evaṁ bho purisa jānāhi,pāpadhammā asaññatā;Mā taṁ lobho adhammo ca,ciraṁ dukkhāya randhayuṁ.
dhp235-255:1.0.249: Dadāti ve yathāsaddhaṁ,yathāpasādanaṁ jano;Tattha yo ca maṅku bhavati,paresaṁ pānabhojane;Na so divā vā rattiṁ vā,samādhimadhigacchati.
dhp235-255:1.0.250: Yassa cetaṁ samucchinnaṁ,mūlaghaccaṁ samūhataṁ;Sa ve divā vā rattiṁ vā,samādhimadhigacchati.
dhp235-255:1.0.251: Natthi rāgasamo aggi,natthi dosasamo gaho;Natthi mohasamaṁ jālaṁ,natthi taṇhāsamā nadī.
dhp235-255:1.0.252: Sudassaṁ vajjamaññesaṁ,attano pana duddasaṁ;Paresaṁ hi so vajjāni,opunāti yathā bhusaṁ;Attano pana chādeti,kaliṁva kitavā saṭho.
dhp235-255:1.0.253: Paravajjānupassissa,niccaṁ ujjhānasaññino;Āsavā tassa vaḍḍhanti,ārā so āsavakkhayā.
dhp235-255:1.0.254: Ākāseva padaṁ natthi,samaṇo natthi bāhire;Papañcābhiratā pajā,nippapañcā tathāgatā.
dhp235-255:1.0.255: Ākāseva padaṁ natthi,samaṇo natthi bāhire;Saṅkhārā sassatā natthi,natthi buddhānamiñjitaṁ.
